grpo_training.reward_signal: 0.0 (TRL environment_factory calls reward functions without environments kwarg)
grpo_training.status: ran but received no reward signal due to TRL API mismatch

what_worked: Model learned to output valid JSON tool calls (was: long reasoning text)
5 distinct action types used after SFT (was: 1 repeated action before SFT)
Expert trajectory generation produced diverse enrollment (4-11 on easy, 1-11 on medium)
allocate_to_site appeared in medium_bench eval (4 calls)
Heuristic policy improves +23.9% over random baseline across all 3 tasks
Full training pipeline works: environment -> expert traces -> SFT -> GRPO
what_didnt_work: 0 enrollment after training: model over-plans (30-37/50 steps) and under-allocates
GRPO rewards all 0.0: TRL environment_factory reward path doesn't pass environments to reward functions
Model copies example patient_id P-1042 from system prompt instead of reading observation
4B model with 9 SFT steps is insufficient for full recruitment pipeline learning
honest_assessment: The training infrastructure (environment, expert traces, SFT, GRPO, Unsloth, TRL) is complete and functional. SFT produced measurable improvement in output format and action diversity. The training budget (9 SFT steps, 3 GRPO steps on a 4B model) was insufficient for the model to learn the full recruitment pipeline. This is consistent with the hackathon guide's warning that RL needs sufficient training budget and non-zero reward probability.
